title: RepoBrief Agent Workbench boundary
goal: Define and sequence the RepoBrief Agent Workbench / Patch Evaluation Sidecar boundary without moving patch or runtime authority into RepoBrief core.
completion: The RepoBrief Agent Workbench boundary is documented.
Patch-evaluation artifacts are specified before any runtime Sidecar implementation.
RepoBrief remains read-only with respect to patch/test execution while deterministic code-understanding tools may remain integrated.
Overlapping Lenskit-agent-optimization suggestions are mapped to existing roadmap tasks instead of duplicated blindly.

metadata.source_thread: Lenskit / RepoBrief / rLens Write-Axis planning after PR #889
metadata.prerequisite_observation: User reported Lenskit PR #889 merged; live verification remains required at task start.
metadata.boundary_decision: Agent Workbench is integrated deterministic read-only code-understanding; Patch Evaluation Sidecar owns external patch/test/sandbox authority; RepoBrief core must not become a mutation engine.
